resumo: Talking about likes and preferences helps students express personal choices in English.
This topic expands vocabulary related to activities, food, music and interests.
Learning these structures improves participation in simple dialogues.

explicacao.texto: Students use simple structures to say what they like, dislike or prefer in different situations. This makes communication more personal, meaningful and connected to everyday life.
explicacao.dica: Practice talking about real preferences to make the language more useful.

explicacao.texto: Talking about likes is more than memorizing vocabulary. It helps students take part in conversations, answer questions and justify simple opinions in a clear way.
explicacao.dica: Try to combine preference expressions with short reasons or examples.

exemplos.enunciado: Read: 'I like music because it helps me relax.'
passos: Identify the expression of preference in the sentence.
Observe how the speaker gives a simple reason.
exemplos.resposta: This is a simple example of expressing likes in English.

exercicios.explicacao: This topic supports basic communication about interests and preferences.

exercicios.enunciado: A simple reason in a sentence makes communication:
exercicios.explicacao: Adding a short reason helps the listener understand the preference better.

alternativas: Talking about preferences helps students participate in simple dialogues.
Preferences cannot be expressed with short English sentences.
This topic has no practical use.
Personal choices are not part of communication.
exercicios.respostaCorreta: Talking about preferences helps students participate in simple dialogues.
exercicios.explicacao: This content helps students interact more naturally in familiar conversations.

exercicios.enunciado: Studying this topic helps the student:
alternativas: talk about interests with more confidence
exercicios.respostaCorreta: talk about interests with more confidence
exercicios.explicacao: The topic expands vocabulary and supports communication about everyday choices.

simulado.enunciado: The main idea of this topic is that students can:
alternativas: express likes and preferences in everyday English
replace speech with isolated words only
simulado.respostaCorreta: express likes and preferences in everyday English
simulado.explicacao: This topic helps students communicate personal choices in simple and useful ways.
